---
title: "04 Robustness"
author: "Nate Breznau"

---

I first tried running this with completed primary only (ed3 == 1) as a comparison group, but the case numbers were too small for some of the categories and prediction was unstable. Then I switched to completed secondary versus completed tertiary.

## Setup   

```{r setup, echo = F, warning = F, message = F}

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

packages <- c('tidyverse',
              'readr',
              'knitr',
              'here',
              'ggplot2',
              'ggrepel',
              'ragg',
              'kableExtra',
              'countrycode',
              'readxl',
              'jtools',
              'lme4',
              'lmerTest',
              'broom.mixed',
              'viridis',
              'survey',
              'ggpubr',
              'purrr')

pacman::p_load(packages, character.only = T)

```

## Data

```{r }

df2 <- read_rds(here("Data", "df2.RDS")) 

```


### Table 2. GLM/Multilevel

#### Subset by Education

df_sub not secondary completed
df_sub_ed23 secondary or more

```{r}
df2_sub <- df2 %>%
  mutate(
    ed3_secondary = as.integer(ed3 == 2),
    ed3_tertiary  = as.integer(ed3 == 3)
  ) %>%
  subset(ed_currently != 1)

df2_sub_ed3 <- df2_sub %>%
  subset(ed3 == 3)

df2_sub <- df2_sub %>%
  subset(ed3 <= 2)
```

### ED3 == 1 | 2

#### Within/Between

```{r}
df2_sub <- df2_sub %>%
  group_by(iso3c) %>%
  mutate(
    male = ifelse(female == 1, 0, 1),
    NFE12_between = sum(SPFWT0 * NFE12, na.rm = TRUE) / sum(SPFWT0[!is.na(NFE12)], na.rm = TRUE),
    female_between = sum(SPFWT0 * female, na.rm = TRUE) / sum(SPFWT0[!is.na(female)], na.rm = TRUE),
    male_between = sum(SPFWT0 * male, na.rm = T) / sum(SPFWT0[!is.na(male)], na.rm = TRUE),
    children_between = sum(SPFWT0 * children, na.rm = TRUE) / sum(SPFWT0[!is.na(children)], na.rm = TRUE),
    ed3_secondary_between = sum(SPFWT0 * ed3_secondary, na.rm = TRUE) / sum(SPFWT0[!is.na(ed3_secondary)], na.rm = TRUE),
    #ed3_tertiary_between  = sum(SPFWT0 * ed3_tertiary,  na.rm = TRUE) / sum(SPFWT0[!is.na(ed3_tertiary)],  na.rm = TRUE),

    forborn_between = sum(SPFWT0 * FORBORN, na.rm = TRUE) / sum(SPFWT0[!is.na(FORBORN)], na.rm = TRUE),
    forlang_between = sum(SPFWT0 * FORLANG, na.rm = TRUE) / sum(SPFWT0[!is.na(FORLANG)], na.rm = TRUE),

    NFE12_within = NFE12 - NFE12_between,
    children_within = children - children_between,
    female_within = female - female_between,
    ed3_secondary_within = ed3_secondary - ed3_secondary_between,
    #ed3_tertiary_within = ed3_tertiary - ed3_tertiary_between,
    forborn_within = FORBORN - forborn_between,
    forlang_within = FORLANG - forlang_between
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# the within effects need to be further centered by group 

df2_imm <- df2_sub %>% 
  subset(FORBORN == 1) %>% 
  group_by(iso3c) %>% 
  mutate(NFE12_within = NFE12_within - mean(NFE12_within, na.rm = TRUE), 
         female_within = female_within - mean(female_within, na.rm = T), 
         children_within = children_within - mean(children_within, na.rm = TRUE),
         ed3_secondary_within = ed3_secondary_within - mean(ed3_secondary_within, na.rm = TRUE), 
         #ed3_tertiary_within = ed3_tertiary_within - mean(ed3_tertiary_within, na.rm = TRUE) 
         ) %>% 
  ungroup() 


df2_nat <- df2_sub %>% 
  subset(FORBORN_not == 1) %>% 
  group_by(iso3c) %>% 
  mutate(NFE12_within = NFE12_within - mean(NFE12_within, na.rm = TRUE),
         children_within = children_within - mean(children_within, na.rm = TRUE), 
         female_within = female_within - mean(female_within, na.rm = T),
         ed3_secondary_within = ed3_secondary_within - mean(ed3_secondary_within, na.rm = TRUE), 
          #ed3_tertiary_within = ed3_tertiary_within - mean(ed3_tertiary_within, na.rm = TRUE) 
         ) %>% ungroup()

between_vars <- c(
  "NFE12_between", "female_between", "children_between",
  "ed3_secondary_between",
  "forborn_between", "forlang_between"
)

# build country-level x-standardized-scored between 
country_between_scaled <- function(dat, between_vars, suffix = "_z") {

  # get one row per country (so no implicit weighting by country sample size)
  country_vals <- dat %>%
    distinct(iso3c, across(all_of(between_vars)))

  # z-score across countries
  country_z <- country_vals %>%
    mutate(
      across(all_of(between_vars), ~{
        m <- mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE)
        s <- sd(.x, na.rm = TRUE)
        if (is.na(s) || s == 0) NA_real_ else as.numeric((.x - m) / s)
      }, .names = paste0("{.col}", suffix))
    ) %>%
    select(iso3c, ends_with(suffix))

  country_z
}
```

#### Join

```{r}

# df2
df2_sub <- df2_sub %>%
  left_join(country_between_scaled(df2_sub, between_vars), by = "iso3c")

# df2_imm
df2_imm <- df2_imm %>%
  left_join(country_between_scaled(df2_imm, between_vars), by = "iso3c") 

# df2_nat
df2_nat <- df2_nat %>%
  left_join(country_between_scaled(df2_nat, between_vars), by = "iso3c") 
```

#### GLM

```{r}
m4 <- lmer(
  skill_reading ~ 
    NFE12_within + NFE12_between_z +
    female_within + female_between_z + 
    children_within + children_between_z +
    forlang_within + forlang_between_z +
    forborn_within + forborn_between_z +
    # interaction with all sub-interactions
    female_within*forborn_within*children_within*forlang_within*NFE12_within +
    ed3_secondary_within + ed3_secondary_between_z +
    #ed3_tertiary_within + ed3_tertiary_between_z +
    gdppc_k_log +
    (1 | iso3c),
  data = subset(df2_sub)
)

export_summs(
  m4,
  coefs = c(
    "(Intercept)" = "(Intercept)",
    "ALE (within)" = "NFE12_within",
    "ALE (between)" = "NFE12_between_z",
    "Female (within)" = "female_within",
    "Female (between)" = "female_between_z",
    "Children (within)" = "children_within",
    "Children (between)" = "children_between_z",
    "Non-native speaker (within)" = "forlang_within",
    "Non-native speaker (between)" = "forlang_between_z",
    "Foreign-born (within)" = "forborn_within",
    "Foreign-born (between)" = "forborn_between_z",
    "Secondary education (within)" = "ed3_secondary_within",
    "Secondary education (between)" = "ed3_secondary_between_z",
    #"Tertiary education (within)" = "ed3_tertiary_within",
    #"Tertiary education (between)" = "ed3_tertiary_between_z",
    "GDP per capita (log k)" = "gdppc_k_log",
    "Female x Foreign-born (within)" = "female_within:forborn_within",
    "Female x Children (within)" = "female_within:children_within",
    "Children x Foreign-born (within)" = "children_within:forborn_within",      
    "Female x Foreign-language (within)" = "female_within:forlang_within",  
    "Foreign-language x Foreign-born (within)" = "forlang_within:forborn_within", 
    "Children x Foreign-language (within)" = "children_within:forlang_within",
    "ALE x Female (within)" =  "NFE12_within:female_within",        
    "ALE x Foreign-born (within)" = "NFE12_within:forborn_within",
    "ALE x Children (within)" = "NFE12_within:children_within",                 
    "ALE x Foreign-language (within)" = "NFE12_within:forlang_within",    
    "Female x Children x Foreign-born" = "female_within:children_within:forborn_within",  
    "Female x Foreign-language x Foreign-born (within)" = "female_within:forlang_within:forborn_within",  
    "Female x Children x Foreign-language (within)" = "female_within:children_within:forlang_within",
    "Children x Foreign-language x Foreign-born (within)" = "children_within:forlang_within:forborn_within",
    "ALE x Female x Foreign-born (within)" = "NFE12_within:female_within:forborn_within", 
    "ALE x Female x Children (within)" = "NFE12_within:female_within:children_within",
    "ALE x Children x Foreign-born (within)" = "NFE12_within:children_within:forborn_within",  
    "ALE x Female x Foreign-language (within)" = "NFE12_within:female_within:forlang_within",  
    "ALE x Foreign-language x Foreign-born (within)" = "NFE12_within:forlang_within:forborn_within",
    "ALE x Children x Foreign-language (within)" = "NFE12_within:children_within:forlang_within",
    "Female x Children x Foreign-language x Foreign-born (within)" = "female_within:children_within:forlang_within:forborn_within", 
    "ALE x Female x Children x Foreign-born (within)" = "NFE12_within:female_within:children_within:forborn_within",    
    "ALE x Female x Foreign-language x Foreign-born (within)" = "NFE12_within:female_within:forlang_within:forborn_within",
    "ALE x Female x Children x Foreign-language (within)" = "NFE12_within:female_within:children_within:forlang_within",   
    "ALE x Children x Foreign-language x Foreign-born" = "NFE12_within:children_within:forlang_within:forborn_within",
    "ALE x Female x Children x Foreign-language x Foreign-born" = "NFE12_within:female_within:children_within:forlang_within:forborn_within"
  ),
  to.file = "docx",
  file.name = here("Results", "Table_S3_ed1.docx")
)

include_graphics(here("Results", "Table_S3_ed1.docx"))
```

#### Predictions

```{r}

df2r <- subset(df2_sub, !is.na(female) & !is.na(NFE12) & !is.na(children_within) & !is.na(forborn_within) & !is.na(forlang_within) & !is.na(ed3) & !is.na(gdppc) & !is.na(skill_reading))

# Calculate grand means. 

gm_female <- mean(df2r$female_between, na.rm = TRUE)
gm_forborn <- mean(df2r$forborn_between, na.rm = TRUE)
gm_children <- mean(df2r$children_between, na.rm = TRUE)
gm_forlang <- mean(df2r$forlang_between, na.rm = TRUE)
gm_nfe12 <- mean(df2r$NFE12_between, na.rm = TRUE)

#Type 1: Foreign-born parent, non-native speaker
df_type10 <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 1 - gm_female, forborn_within = 1 - gm_forborn, children_within = 1 - gm_children, forlang_within = 1 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 0 - gm_nfe12)
df_type11 <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 1 - gm_female, forborn_within = 1 - gm_forborn, children_within = 1 - gm_children, forlang_within = 1 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 1 - gm_nfe12)
df_type10m <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 0 - gm_female, forborn_within = 1 - gm_forborn, children_within = 1 - gm_children, forlang_within = 1 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 0 - gm_nfe12)
df_type11m <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 0 - gm_female, forborn_within = 1 - gm_forborn, children_within = 1 - gm_children, forlang_within = 1 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 1 - gm_nfe12)

#Type 2: Foreign-born no children, non-native speaker
df_type20 <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 1 - gm_female, forborn_within = 1 - gm_forborn, children_within = 0 - gm_children, forlang_within = 1 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 0 - gm_nfe12)
df_type21 <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 1 - gm_female, forborn_within = 1 - gm_forborn, children_within = 0 - gm_children, forlang_within = 1 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 1 - gm_nfe12)
df_type20m <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 0 - gm_female, forborn_within = 1 - gm_forborn, children_within = 0 - gm_children, forlang_within = 1 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 0 - gm_nfe12)
df_type21m <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 0 - gm_female, forborn_within = 1 - gm_forborn, children_within = 0 - gm_children, forlang_within = 1 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 1 - gm_nfe12)

#Type 3: Foreign-born parent, native speaker
df_type30 <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 1 - gm_female, forborn_within = 1 - gm_forborn, children_within = 1 - gm_children, forlang_within = 0 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 0 - gm_nfe12)
df_type31 <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 1 - gm_female, forborn_within = 1 - gm_forborn, children_within = 1 - gm_children, forlang_within = 0 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 1 - gm_nfe12)
df_type30m <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 0 - gm_female, forborn_within = 1 - gm_forborn, children_within = 1 - gm_children, forlang_within = 0 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 0 - gm_nfe12)
df_type31m <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 0 - gm_female, forborn_within = 1 - gm_forborn, children_within = 1 - gm_children, forlang_within = 0 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 1 - gm_nfe12)

#Type 4: Foreign-born no children, native speaker
df_type40 <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 1 - gm_female, forborn_within = 1 - gm_forborn, children_within = 0 - gm_children, forlang_within = 0 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 0 - gm_nfe12)
df_type41 <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 1 - gm_female, forborn_within = 1 - gm_forborn, children_within = 0 - gm_children, forlang_within = 0 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 1 - gm_nfe12)
df_type40m <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 0 - gm_female, forborn_within = 1 - gm_forborn, children_within = 0 - gm_children, forlang_within = 0 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 0 - gm_nfe12)
df_type41m <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 0 - gm_female, forborn_within = 1 - gm_forborn, children_within = 0 - gm_children, forlang_within = 0 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 1 - gm_nfe12)

#Type 5: Native-born parent, native speaker
df_type50 <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 1 - gm_female, forborn_within = 0 - gm_forborn, children_within = 1 - gm_children, forlang_within = 0 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 0 - gm_nfe12)
df_type51 <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 1 - gm_female, forborn_within = 0 - gm_forborn, children_within = 1 - gm_children, forlang_within = 0 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 1 - gm_nfe12)
df_type50m <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 0 - gm_female, forborn_within = 0 - gm_forborn, children_within = 1 - gm_children, forlang_within = 0 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 0 - gm_nfe12)
df_type51m <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 0 - gm_female, forborn_within = 0 - gm_forborn, children_within = 1 - gm_children, forlang_within = 0 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 1 - gm_nfe12)

#Type 6: Native-born no children, native speaker
df_type60 <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 1 - gm_female, forborn_within = 0 - gm_forborn, children_within = 0 - gm_children, forlang_within = 0 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 0 - gm_nfe12)
df_type61 <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 1 - gm_female, forborn_within = 0 - gm_forborn, children_within = 0 - gm_children, forlang_within = 0 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 1 - gm_nfe12)
df_type60m <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 0 - gm_female, forborn_within = 0 - gm_forborn, children_within = 0 - gm_children, forlang_within = 0 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 0 - gm_nfe12)
df_type61m <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 0 - gm_female, forborn_within = 0 - gm_forborn, children_within = 0 - gm_children, forlang_within = 0 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 1 - gm_nfe12)

# make predictions

pred10 <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type10, re.form = NA)
pred11 <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type11, re.form = NA)
pred10m <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type10m, re.form = NA)
pred11m <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type11m, re.form = NA)
pred20 <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type20, re.form = NA)
pred21 <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type21, re.form = NA)
pred20m <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type20m, re.form = NA)
pred21m <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type21m, re.form = NA)
pred30 <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type30, re.form = NA)
pred31 <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type31, re.form = NA)
pred30m <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type30m, re.form = NA)
pred31m <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type31m, re.form = NA)
pred40 <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type40, re.form = NA)
pred41 <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type41, re.form = NA)
pred40m <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type40m, re.form = NA)
pred41m <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type41m, re.form = NA)
pred50 <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type50, re.form = NA)
pred51 <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type51, re.form = NA)
pred50m <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type50m, re.form = NA)
pred51m <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type51m, re.form = NA)
pred60 <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type60, re.form = NA)
pred61 <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type61, re.form = NA)
pred60m <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type60m, re.form = NA)
pred61m <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type61m, re.form = NA)


# Calculate average marginal effect

diff1 <- pred10 - pred11
diff2 <- pred20 - pred21
diff3 <- pred30 - pred31
diff4 <- pred40 - pred41
diff5 <- pred50 - pred51
diff6 <- pred60 - pred61

diff1m <- pred10m - pred11m
diff2m <- pred20m - pred21m
diff3m <- pred30m - pred31m
diff4m <- pred40m - pred41m
diff5m <- pred50m - pred51m
diff6m <- pred60m - pred61m

AME1 <- mean(diff1)
ttest1 <- t.test(pred11, pred10, paired = FALSE)
AME2 <- mean(diff2)
ttest2 <- t.test(pred21, pred20, paired = FALSE)
AME3 <- mean(diff3)
ttest3 <- t.test(pred31, pred30, paired = FALSE)
AME4 <- mean(diff4)
ttest4 <- t.test(pred41, pred40, paired = FALSE)
AME5 <- mean(diff5)
ttest5 <- t.test(pred51, pred50, paired = FALSE)
AME6 <- mean(diff6)
ttest6 <- t.test(pred61, pred60, paired = FALSE)

AME1m <- mean(diff1m)
ttest1m <- t.test(pred11m, pred10m, paired = FALSE)
AME2m <- mean(diff2m)
ttest2m <- t.test(pred21m, pred20m, paired = FALSE)
AME3m <- mean(diff3m)
ttest3m <- t.test(pred31m, pred30m, paired = FALSE)
AME4m <- mean(diff4m)
ttest4m <- t.test(pred41m, pred40m, paired = FALSE)
AME5m <- mean(diff5m)
ttest5m <- t.test(pred51m, pred50m, paired = FALSE)
AME6m <- mean(diff6m)
ttest6m <- t.test(pred61m, pred60m, paired = FALSE)

```


#### Plot

##### Combine values

```{r}

ame_df <- data.frame(
  type = c(
    "1f. Foreign-born mother\nnon-native speaker",
    "2f. Foreign-born no children female\nnon-native speaker",
    "3f. Foreign-born mother\nnative speaker",
    "4f. Foreign-born no children female\nnative speaker",
    "5f. Native-born mother\nnative speaker",
    "6f. Native-born no children female\nnative speaker"
  ),
  AME = c(AME1, AME2, AME3, AME4, AME5, AME6),
  lower = c(ttest1$conf.int[1], ttest2$conf.int[1], ttest3$conf.int[1],
            ttest4$conf.int[1], ttest5$conf.int[1], ttest6$conf.int[1]),
  upper = c(ttest1$conf.int[2], ttest2$conf.int[2], ttest3$conf.int[2],
            ttest4$conf.int[2], ttest5$conf.int[2], ttest6$conf.int[2])
)

ame_df <- ame_df %>%
  mutate(
    AME = -AME,
    lower = lower,
    upper = upper
  )

ame_dfm <- data.frame(
  type = c(
    "1m. Foreign-born father\nnon-native speaker",
    "2m. Foreign-born no children male\nnon-native speaker",
    "3m. Foreign-born father\nnative speaker",
    "4m. Foreign-born no children male\nnative speaker",
    "5m. Native-born father\nnative speaker",
    "6m. Native-born no children male\nnative speaker"
  ),
  AME = c(AME1m, AME2m, AME3m, AME4m, AME5m, AME6m),
  lower = c(ttest1m$conf.int[1], ttest2m$conf.int[1], ttest3m$conf.int[1],
            ttest4m$conf.int[1], ttest5m$conf.int[1], ttest6m$conf.int[1]),
  upper = c(ttest1m$conf.int[2], ttest2m$conf.int[2], ttest3m$conf.int[2],
            ttest4m$conf.int[2], ttest5m$conf.int[2], ttest6m$conf.int[2])
)

ame_dfm <- ame_dfm %>%
  mutate(
    AME = -AME,
    lower = lower,
    upper = upper
  )

ame_all <- bind_rows(
  ame_df  %>% mutate(sex = "f"),
  ame_dfm %>% mutate(sex = "m")
)


ame_all <- ame_all %>%
  mutate(type = factor(type, levels = rev(type)))

pal12 <- viridis(n = nlevels(ame_all$type), option = "D", begin = 0.1, end = 0.9)

# extract numeric prefix (1–6) and sex (f/m)
ame_all <- ame_all %>%
  mutate(
    idx = as.integer(substr(type, 1, 1)),
    sex = ifelse(grepl("^\\dm\\.", type), "m", "f")
  )

# build desired order: 1f,1m,2f,2m,...
type_order <- ame_all %>%
  distinct(type, idx, sex) %>%
  arrange(idx, sex) %>%          # f comes before m alphabetically
  pull(type)

# apply order (reverse because coord_flip)
ame_all$type <- factor(ame_all$type, levels = rev(type_order))

```




##### Fig 1_ed1


```{r}

ame_all <- bind_rows(
  ame_df  %>% mutate(sex = "f"),
  ame_dfm %>% mutate(sex = "m")
) %>%
  mutate(
    idx = as.integer(substr(type, 1, 1)),
    sex = ifelse(grepl("^\\dm\\.", type), "m", "f")
  )

type_order <- ame_all %>%
  distinct(type, idx, sex) %>%
  arrange(idx, sex) %>%
  pull(type)

ame_all <- ame_all %>%
  mutate(
    type = factor(type, levels = rev(type_order))  # reverse for top-to-bottom display
  )

# Add binary indicators for the dot matrix

ame_all <- ame_all %>%
  mutate(
    Female = ifelse(sex == "f", 1, 0),
    `Foreign-born` = case_when(
      idx %in% c(1, 2, 3, 4) ~ 1,
      idx %in% c(5, 6) ~ 0
    ),
    `Non-native-speaker` = case_when(
      idx %in% c(1, 2) ~ 1,
      idx %in% c(3, 4, 5, 6) ~ 0
    ),
    Parent = case_when(
      idx %in% c(1, 3, 5) ~ 1,
      idx %in% c(2, 4, 6) ~ 0
    )
  )

# Convert for dots

dot_df <- ame_all %>%
  select(type, Female, `Foreign-born`, `Non-native-speaker`, Parent) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(Female, `Foreign-born`, `Non-native-speaker`, Parent),
    names_to = "variable",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    variable = factor(
      variable,
      levels = c("Female", "Foreign-born", "Non-native-speaker", "Parent")
    )
  )

# New labelling with dots in a matrix

p_dots <- ggplot(dot_df, aes(x = variable, y = type)) +
  geom_point(
    data = subset(dot_df, value == 0),
    shape = 21,
    size = 3.2,
    stroke = 0.5,
    fill = "white",
    color = "black"
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = subset(dot_df, value == 1),
    shape = 16,
    size = 3.2,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )


p_bar <- ggplot(ame_all, aes(x = type, y = AME, fill = type)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.55, color = "black") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), width = 0.15) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = pal12) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 60, by = 5)) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Without Tertiary\nEducation"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "none"
  )



```



### ED3 == 2 | 3

#### Within/Between

```{r}

df2_sub_ed3 <- df2_sub_ed3 %>%
  group_by(iso3c) %>%
  mutate(
    male = ifelse(female == 1, 0, 1),
    NFE12_between = sum(SPFWT0 * NFE12, na.rm = TRUE) / sum(SPFWT0[!is.na(NFE12)], na.rm = TRUE),
    female_between = sum(SPFWT0 * female, na.rm = TRUE) / sum(SPFWT0[!is.na(female)], na.rm = TRUE),
    male_between = sum(SPFWT0 * male, na.rm = T) / sum(SPFWT0[!is.na(male)], na.rm = TRUE),
    children_between = sum(SPFWT0 * children, na.rm = TRUE) / sum(SPFWT0[!is.na(children)], na.rm = TRUE),
    #ed3_secondary_between = sum(SPFWT0 * ed3_secondary, na.rm = TRUE) / sum(SPFWT0[!is.na(ed3_secondary)], na.rm = TRUE),
    #ed3_tertiary_between  = sum(SPFWT0 * ed3_tertiary,  na.rm = TRUE) / sum(SPFWT0[!is.na(ed3_tertiary)],  na.rm = TRUE),

    forborn_between = sum(SPFWT0 * FORBORN, na.rm = TRUE) / sum(SPFWT0[!is.na(FORBORN)], na.rm = TRUE),
    forlang_between = sum(SPFWT0 * FORLANG, na.rm = TRUE) / sum(SPFWT0[!is.na(FORLANG)], na.rm = TRUE),

    NFE12_within = NFE12 - NFE12_between,
    children_within = children - children_between,
    female_within = female - female_between,
    #ed3_secondary_within = ed3_secondary - ed3_secondary_between,
    #ed3_tertiary_within = ed3_tertiary - ed3_tertiary_between,
    forborn_within = FORBORN - forborn_between,
    forlang_within = FORLANG - forlang_between
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# the within effects need to be further centered by group 

df2_imm <- df2_sub_ed3 %>% 
  subset(FORBORN == 1) %>% 
  group_by(iso3c) %>% 
  mutate(NFE12_within = NFE12_within - mean(NFE12_within, na.rm = TRUE), 
         female_within = female_within - mean(female_within, na.rm = T), 
         children_within = children_within - mean(children_within, na.rm = TRUE)
         #ed3_secondary_within = ed3_secondary_within - mean(ed3_secondary_within, na.rm = TRUE), 
         #ed3_tertiary_within = ed3_tertiary_within - mean(ed3_tertiary_within, na.rm = TRUE) 
         ) %>% 
  ungroup() 


df2_nat <- df2_sub_ed3 %>% 
  subset(FORBORN_not == 1) %>% 
  group_by(iso3c) %>% 
  mutate(NFE12_within = NFE12_within - mean(NFE12_within, na.rm = TRUE),
         children_within = children_within - mean(children_within, na.rm = TRUE), 
         female_within = female_within - mean(female_within, na.rm = T)
         #ed3_secondary_within = ed3_secondary_within - mean(ed3_secondary_within, na.rm = TRUE), 
          #ed3_tertiary_within = ed3_tertiary_within - mean(ed3_tertiary_within, na.rm = TRUE) 
         ) %>% ungroup()

between_vars <- c(
  "NFE12_between", "female_between", "children_between",
  "forborn_between", "forlang_between"
)

# build country-level x-standardized-scored between 
country_between_scaled <- function(dat, between_vars, suffix = "_z") {

  # get one row per country (so no implicit weighting by country sample size)
  country_vals <- dat %>%
    distinct(iso3c, across(all_of(between_vars)))

  # z-score across countries
  country_z <- country_vals %>%
    mutate(
      across(all_of(between_vars), ~{
        m <- mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE)
        s <- sd(.x, na.rm = TRUE)
        if (is.na(s) || s == 0) NA_real_ else as.numeric((.x - m) / s)
      }, .names = paste0("{.col}", suffix))
    ) %>%
    select(iso3c, ends_with(suffix))

  country_z
}
```

#### Join

```{r}

# df2
df2_sub_ed3 <- df2_sub_ed3 %>%
  left_join(country_between_scaled(df2_sub_ed3, between_vars), by = "iso3c")

# df2_imm
df2_imm <- df2_imm %>%
  left_join(country_between_scaled(df2_imm, between_vars), by = "iso3c") 

# df2_nat
df2_nat <- df2_nat %>%
  left_join(country_between_scaled(df2_nat, between_vars), by = "iso3c") 
```

#### GLM

```{r}
m4 <- lmer(
  skill_reading ~ 
    NFE12_within + NFE12_between_z +
    female_within + female_between_z + 
    children_within + children_between_z +
    forlang_within + forlang_between_z +
    forborn_within + forborn_between_z +
    # interaction with all sub-interactions
    female_within*forborn_within*children_within*forlang_within*NFE12_within +
    #ed3_secondary_within + ed3_secondary_between_z +
    #ed3_tertiary_within + ed3_tertiary_between_z +
    gdppc_k_log +
    (1 | iso3c),
  data = subset(df2_sub_ed3)
)

export_summs(
  m4,
  coefs = c(
    "(Intercept)" = "(Intercept)",
    "ALE (within)" = "NFE12_within",
    "ALE (between)" = "NFE12_between_z",
    "Female (within)" = "female_within",
    "Female (between)" = "female_between_z",
    "Children (within)" = "children_within",
    "Children (between)" = "children_between_z",
    "Non-native speaker (within)" = "forlang_within",
    "Non-native speaker (between)" = "forlang_between_z",
    "Foreign-born (within)" = "forborn_within",
    "Foreign-born (between)" = "forborn_between_z",
    #"Secondary education (within)" = "ed3_secondary_within",
    #"Secondary education (between)" = "ed3_secondary_between_z",
    #"Tertiary education (within)" = "ed3_tertiary_within",
    #"Tertiary education (between)" = "ed3_tertiary_between_z",
    "GDP per capita (log k)" = "gdppc_k_log",
    "Female x Foreign-born (within)" = "female_within:forborn_within",
    "Female x Children (within)" = "female_within:children_within",
    "Children x Foreign-born (within)" = "children_within:forborn_within",      
    "Female x Foreign-language (within)" = "female_within:forlang_within",  
    "Foreign-language x Foreign-born (within)" = "forlang_within:forborn_within", 
    "Children x Foreign-language (within)" = "children_within:forlang_within",
    "ALE x Female (within)" =  "NFE12_within:female_within",        
    "ALE x Foreign-born (within)" = "NFE12_within:forborn_within",
    "ALE x Children (within)" = "NFE12_within:children_within",                 
    "ALE x Foreign-language (within)" = "NFE12_within:forlang_within",    
    "Female x Children x Foreign-born" = "female_within:children_within:forborn_within",  
    "Female x Foreign-language x Foreign-born (within)" = "female_within:forlang_within:forborn_within",  
    "Female x Children x Foreign-language (within)" = "female_within:children_within:forlang_within",
    "Children x Foreign-language x Foreign-born (within)" = "children_within:forlang_within:forborn_within",
    "ALE x Female x Foreign-born (within)" = "NFE12_within:female_within:forborn_within", 
    "ALE x Female x Children (within)" = "NFE12_within:female_within:children_within",
    "ALE x Children x Foreign-born (within)" = "NFE12_within:children_within:forborn_within",  
    "ALE x Female x Foreign-language (within)" = "NFE12_within:female_within:forlang_within",  
    "ALE x Foreign-language x Foreign-born (within)" = "NFE12_within:forlang_within:forborn_within",
    "ALE x Children x Foreign-language (within)" = "NFE12_within:children_within:forlang_within",
    "Female x Children x Foreign-language x Foreign-born (within)" = "female_within:children_within:forlang_within:forborn_within", 
    "ALE x Female x Children x Foreign-born (within)" = "NFE12_within:female_within:children_within:forborn_within",    
    "ALE x Female x Foreign-language x Foreign-born (within)" = "NFE12_within:female_within:forlang_within:forborn_within",
    "ALE x Female x Children x Foreign-language (within)" = "NFE12_within:female_within:children_within:forlang_within",   
    "ALE x Children x Foreign-language x Foreign-born" = "NFE12_within:children_within:forlang_within:forborn_within",
    "ALE x Female x Children x Foreign-language x Foreign-born" = "NFE12_within:female_within:children_within:forlang_within:forborn_within"
  ),
  to.file = "docx",
  file.name = here("Results", "Table_S3_ed1.docx")
)

include_graphics(here("Results", "Table_S3_ed1.docx"))
```

#### Predictions

```{r}

df2r <- subset(df2_sub_ed3, !is.na(female) & !is.na(NFE12) & !is.na(children_within) & !is.na(forborn_within) & !is.na(forlang_within) & !is.na(ed3) & !is.na(gdppc) & !is.na(skill_reading))

# Calculate grand means. 

gm_female <- mean(df2r$female_between, na.rm = TRUE)
gm_forborn <- mean(df2r$forborn_between, na.rm = TRUE)
gm_children <- mean(df2r$children_between, na.rm = TRUE)
gm_forlang <- mean(df2r$forlang_between, na.rm = TRUE)
gm_nfe12 <- mean(df2r$NFE12_between, na.rm = TRUE)

#Type 1: Foreign-born parent, non-native speaker
df_type10 <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 1 - gm_female, forborn_within = 1 - gm_forborn, children_within = 1 - gm_children, forlang_within = 1 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 0 - gm_nfe12)
df_type11 <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 1 - gm_female, forborn_within = 1 - gm_forborn, children_within = 1 - gm_children, forlang_within = 1 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 1 - gm_nfe12)
df_type10m <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 0 - gm_female, forborn_within = 1 - gm_forborn, children_within = 1 - gm_children, forlang_within = 1 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 0 - gm_nfe12)
df_type11m <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 0 - gm_female, forborn_within = 1 - gm_forborn, children_within = 1 - gm_children, forlang_within = 1 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 1 - gm_nfe12)

#Type 2: Foreign-born no children, non-native speaker
df_type20 <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 1 - gm_female, forborn_within = 1 - gm_forborn, children_within = 0 - gm_children, forlang_within = 1 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 0 - gm_nfe12)
df_type21 <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 1 - gm_female, forborn_within = 1 - gm_forborn, children_within = 0 - gm_children, forlang_within = 1 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 1 - gm_nfe12)
df_type20m <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 0 - gm_female, forborn_within = 1 - gm_forborn, children_within = 0 - gm_children, forlang_within = 1 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 0 - gm_nfe12)
df_type21m <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 0 - gm_female, forborn_within = 1 - gm_forborn, children_within = 0 - gm_children, forlang_within = 1 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 1 - gm_nfe12)

#Type 3: Foreign-born parent, native speaker
df_type30 <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 1 - gm_female, forborn_within = 1 - gm_forborn, children_within = 1 - gm_children, forlang_within = 0 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 0 - gm_nfe12)
df_type31 <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 1 - gm_female, forborn_within = 1 - gm_forborn, children_within = 1 - gm_children, forlang_within = 0 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 1 - gm_nfe12)
df_type30m <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 0 - gm_female, forborn_within = 1 - gm_forborn, children_within = 1 - gm_children, forlang_within = 0 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 0 - gm_nfe12)
df_type31m <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 0 - gm_female, forborn_within = 1 - gm_forborn, children_within = 1 - gm_children, forlang_within = 0 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 1 - gm_nfe12)

#Type 4: Foreign-born no children, native speaker
df_type40 <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 1 - gm_female, forborn_within = 1 - gm_forborn, children_within = 0 - gm_children, forlang_within = 0 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 0 - gm_nfe12)
df_type41 <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 1 - gm_female, forborn_within = 1 - gm_forborn, children_within = 0 - gm_children, forlang_within = 0 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 1 - gm_nfe12)
df_type40m <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 0 - gm_female, forborn_within = 1 - gm_forborn, children_within = 0 - gm_children, forlang_within = 0 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 0 - gm_nfe12)
df_type41m <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 0 - gm_female, forborn_within = 1 - gm_forborn, children_within = 0 - gm_children, forlang_within = 0 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 1 - gm_nfe12)

#Type 5: Native-born parent, native speaker
df_type50 <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 1 - gm_female, forborn_within = 0 - gm_forborn, children_within = 1 - gm_children, forlang_within = 0 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 0 - gm_nfe12)
df_type51 <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 1 - gm_female, forborn_within = 0 - gm_forborn, children_within = 1 - gm_children, forlang_within = 0 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 1 - gm_nfe12)
df_type50m <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 0 - gm_female, forborn_within = 0 - gm_forborn, children_within = 1 - gm_children, forlang_within = 0 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 0 - gm_nfe12)
df_type51m <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 0 - gm_female, forborn_within = 0 - gm_forborn, children_within = 1 - gm_children, forlang_within = 0 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 1 - gm_nfe12)

#Type 6: Native-born no children, native speaker
df_type60 <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 1 - gm_female, forborn_within = 0 - gm_forborn, children_within = 0 - gm_children, forlang_within = 0 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 0 - gm_nfe12)
df_type61 <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 1 - gm_female, forborn_within = 0 - gm_forborn, children_within = 0 - gm_children, forlang_within = 0 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 1 - gm_nfe12)
df_type60m <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 0 - gm_female, forborn_within = 0 - gm_forborn, children_within = 0 - gm_children, forlang_within = 0 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 0 - gm_nfe12)
df_type61m <- df2r %>% mutate(female_within = 0 - gm_female, forborn_within = 0 - gm_forborn, children_within = 0 - gm_children, forlang_within = 0 - gm_forlang, NFE12_within = 1 - gm_nfe12)

# make predictions

pred10 <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type10, re.form = NA)
pred11 <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type11, re.form = NA)
pred10m <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type10m, re.form = NA)
pred11m <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type11m, re.form = NA)
pred20 <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type20, re.form = NA)
pred21 <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type21, re.form = NA)
pred20m <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type20m, re.form = NA)
pred21m <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type21m, re.form = NA)
pred30 <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type30, re.form = NA)
pred31 <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type31, re.form = NA)
pred30m <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type30m, re.form = NA)
pred31m <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type31m, re.form = NA)
pred40 <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type40, re.form = NA)
pred41 <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type41, re.form = NA)
pred40m <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type40m, re.form = NA)
pred41m <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type41m, re.form = NA)
pred50 <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type50, re.form = NA)
pred51 <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type51, re.form = NA)
pred50m <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type50m, re.form = NA)
pred51m <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type51m, re.form = NA)
pred60 <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type60, re.form = NA)
pred61 <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type61, re.form = NA)
pred60m <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type60m, re.form = NA)
pred61m <- predict(m4, newdata = df_type61m, re.form = NA)


# Calculate average marginal effect

diff1 <- pred10 - pred11
diff2 <- pred20 - pred21
diff3 <- pred30 - pred31
diff4 <- pred40 - pred41
diff5 <- pred50 - pred51
diff6 <- pred60 - pred61

diff1m <- pred10m - pred11m
diff2m <- pred20m - pred21m
diff3m <- pred30m - pred31m
diff4m <- pred40m - pred41m
diff5m <- pred50m - pred51m
diff6m <- pred60m - pred61m

AME1 <- mean(diff1)
ttest1 <- t.test(pred11, pred10, paired = FALSE)
AME2 <- mean(diff2)
ttest2 <- t.test(pred21, pred20, paired = FALSE)
AME3 <- mean(diff3)
ttest3 <- t.test(pred31, pred30, paired = FALSE)
AME4 <- mean(diff4)
ttest4 <- t.test(pred41, pred40, paired = FALSE)
AME5 <- mean(diff5)
ttest5 <- t.test(pred51, pred50, paired = FALSE)
AME6 <- mean(diff6)
ttest6 <- t.test(pred61, pred60, paired = FALSE)

AME1m <- mean(diff1m)
ttest1m <- t.test(pred11m, pred10m, paired = FALSE)
AME2m <- mean(diff2m)
ttest2m <- t.test(pred21m, pred20m, paired = FALSE)
AME3m <- mean(diff3m)
ttest3m <- t.test(pred31m, pred30m, paired = FALSE)
AME4m <- mean(diff4m)
ttest4m <- t.test(pred41m, pred40m, paired = FALSE)
AME5m <- mean(diff5m)
ttest5m <- t.test(pred51m, pred50m, paired = FALSE)
AME6m <- mean(diff6m)
ttest6m <- t.test(pred61m, pred60m, paired = FALSE)

```


#### Plot

##### Combine values

```{r}

ame_df <- data.frame(
  type = c(
    "1f. Foreign-born mother\nnon-native speaker",
    "2f. Foreign-born no children female\nnon-native speaker",
    "3f. Foreign-born mother\nnative speaker",
    "4f. Foreign-born no children female\nnative speaker",
    "5f. Native-born mother\nnative speaker",
    "6f. Native-born no children female\nnative speaker"
  ),
  AME = c(AME1, AME2, AME3, AME4, AME5, AME6),
  lower = c(ttest1$conf.int[1], ttest2$conf.int[1], ttest3$conf.int[1],
            ttest4$conf.int[1], ttest5$conf.int[1], ttest6$conf.int[1]),
  upper = c(ttest1$conf.int[2], ttest2$conf.int[2], ttest3$conf.int[2],
            ttest4$conf.int[2], ttest5$conf.int[2], ttest6$conf.int[2])
)

ame_df <- ame_df %>%
  mutate(
    AME = -AME,
    lower = lower,
    upper = upper
  )

ame_dfm <- data.frame(
  type = c(
    "1m. Foreign-born father\nnon-native speaker",
    "2m. Foreign-born no children male\nnon-native speaker",
    "3m. Foreign-born father\nnative speaker",
    "4m. Foreign-born no children male\nnative speaker",
    "5m. Native-born father\nnative speaker",
    "6m. Native-born no children male\nnative speaker"
  ),
  AME = c(AME1m, AME2m, AME3m, AME4m, AME5m, AME6m),
  lower = c(ttest1m$conf.int[1], ttest2m$conf.int[1], ttest3m$conf.int[1],
            ttest4m$conf.int[1], ttest5m$conf.int[1], ttest6m$conf.int[1]),
  upper = c(ttest1m$conf.int[2], ttest2m$conf.int[2], ttest3m$conf.int[2],
            ttest4m$conf.int[2], ttest5m$conf.int[2], ttest6m$conf.int[2])
)

ame_dfm <- ame_dfm %>%
  mutate(
    AME = -AME,
    lower = lower,
    upper = upper
  )

ame_all <- bind_rows(
  ame_df  %>% mutate(sex = "f"),
  ame_dfm %>% mutate(sex = "m")
)


ame_all <- ame_all %>%
  mutate(type = factor(type, levels = rev(type)))

pal12 <- viridis(n = nlevels(ame_all$type), option = "D", begin = 0.1, end = 0.9)

# extract numeric prefix (1–6) and sex (f/m)
ame_all <- ame_all %>%
  mutate(
    idx = as.integer(substr(type, 1, 1)),
    sex = ifelse(grepl("^\\dm\\.", type), "m", "f")
  )

# build desired order: 1f,1m,2f,2m,...
type_order <- ame_all %>%
  distinct(type, idx, sex) %>%
  arrange(idx, sex) %>%          # f comes before m alphabetically
  pull(type)

# apply order (reverse because coord_flip)
ame_all$type <- factor(ame_all$type, levels = rev(type_order))

```




##### Fig 1_ed1


```{r}

ame_all <- bind_rows(
  ame_df  %>% mutate(sex = "f"),
  ame_dfm %>% mutate(sex = "m")
) %>%
  mutate(
    idx = as.integer(substr(type, 1, 1)),
    sex = ifelse(grepl("^\\dm\\.", type), "m", "f")
  )

type_order <- ame_all %>%
  distinct(type, idx, sex) %>%
  arrange(idx, sex) %>%
  pull(type)

ame_all <- ame_all %>%
  mutate(
    type = factor(type, levels = rev(type_order))  # reverse for top-to-bottom display
  )





p_bar_t <- ggplot(ame_all, aes(x = type, y = AME, fill = type)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.55, color = "black") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), width = 0.15) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = pal12) +
  #scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 60, by = 5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 30, by = 5), limits = c(0, 30)) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Tertiary Education"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "none"
  )



```

# Coombine panels
```{r}



#p_final <- p_dots + p_bar +
#  plot_layout(widths = c(1.1, 2.4))

agg_png(here("Results", "Fig1_ed.png"), res = 144, height = 750, width = 1000)

ggarrange(
  p_dots,
  p_bar,
  p_bar_t,
  ncol = 3,
  widths = c(1.4, 1.4, 1.4),
  align = "h"
)

dev.off()

include_graphics(here("Results", "Fig1_ed.png"))
```


### Shiny App

This requires that 03_Analyses.Rmd has been run and has all objects/helpers loaded. 

```{r}

# NON-TERTIARY

# Re-run  non-tertiary GLM 
m4_ed1 <- lmer(
  skill_reading ~ NFE12_within + NFE12_between_z + female_within + female_between_z + 
    children_within + children_between_z + forlang_within + forlang_between_z +
    forborn_within + forborn_between_z + 
    female_within*forborn_within*children_within*forlang_within*NFE12_within +
    ed3_secondary_within + ed3_secondary_between_z + gdppc_k_log + (1 | iso3c),
  data = df2_sub
)

# Subset for predictions (Non-tertiary)
df2r_ed1 <- subset(df2_sub, !is.na(female) & !is.na(NFE12) & !is.na(children_within) & 
                   !is.na(forborn_within) & !is.na(forlang_within) & !is.na(ed3) & 
                   !is.na(gdppc) & !is.na(skill_reading))

# Calculate Context Effects (m5) for Non-tertiary
df2r_ed1$m4_baseline_pred <- predict(m4_ed1, re.form = NA)
m5_ed1 <- lmer(skill_reading ~ 0 + offset(m4_baseline_pred) + (1 + NFE12_within | iso3c), data = df2r_ed1)

ctx_df_ed1 <- ranef(m5_ed1)$iso3c %>% 
  rownames_to_column("iso3c") %>% 
  select(iso3c, context_effect = NFE12_within)

# Run Precomputation Loop for Non-tertiary
precomp_ed1 <- pmap_dfr(spec_grid, function(female, FORBORN, FORLANG, children, spec_id) {
  spec <- list(female=female, FORBORN=FORBORN, FORLANG=FORLANG, children=children)
  ame <- calc_ame_spec(m4_ed1, df2r_ed1, spec, weight_var="aweight")
  # Use df2_sub so population percentages represent the Non-tertiary population
  cg  <- calc_country_gains(df2_sub, spec, AME=ame$AME, ctx_data=ctx_df_ed1, weight_var="aweight")
  
  cg$spec_id <- spec_id
  cg$AME     <- ame$AME
  cg$SE      <- ame$SE
  cg$lower   <- ame$lower
  cg$upper   <- ame$upper
  cg$ed_level <- "Non-tertiary"
  cg
})


# TERTIARY 

# Re-run the tertiary GLM 
m4_ed3 <- lmer(
  skill_reading ~ NFE12_within + NFE12_between_z + female_within + female_between_z + 
    children_within + children_between_z + forlang_within + forlang_between_z +
    forborn_within + forborn_between_z +
    female_within*forborn_within*children_within*forlang_within*NFE12_within +
    gdppc_k_log + (1 | iso3c),
  data = df2_sub_ed3
)

# Subset for predictions (Tertiary)
df2r_ed3 <- subset(df2_sub_ed3, !is.na(female) & !is.na(NFE12) & !is.na(children_within) & 
                   !is.na(forborn_within) & !is.na(forlang_within) & !is.na(ed3) & 
                   !is.na(gdppc) & !is.na(skill_reading))

# Calculate Context Effects (m5) for Tertiary
df2r_ed3$m4_baseline_pred <- predict(m4_ed3, re.form = NA)
m5_ed3 <- lmer(skill_reading ~ 0 + offset(m4_baseline_pred) + (1 + NFE12_within | iso3c), data = df2r_ed3)

ctx_df_ed3 <- ranef(m5_ed3)$iso3c %>% 
  rownames_to_column("iso3c") %>% 
  select(iso3c, context_effect = NFE12_within)

# Run Precomputation Loop for Tertiary
precomp_ed3 <- pmap_dfr(spec_grid, function(female, FORBORN, FORLANG, children, spec_id) {
  spec <- list(female=female, FORBORN=FORBORN, FORLANG=FORLANG, children=children)
  ame <- calc_ame_spec(m4_ed3, df2r_ed3, spec, weight_var="aweight")
  # Use df2_sub_ed3 so population percentages represent the Tertiary population
  cg  <- calc_country_gains(df2_sub_ed3, spec, AME=ame$AME, ctx_data=ctx_df_ed3, weight_var="aweight")
  
  cg$spec_id <- spec_id
  cg$AME     <- ame$AME
  cg$SE      <- ame$SE
  cg$lower   <- ame$lower
  cg$upper   <- ame$upper
  cg$ed_level <- "Tertiary"
  cg
})



# Load the original "All" precomputed generated in 03_Analyses.Rmd

precomp_all <- readRDS(here("Shiny", "precomp_spec_country.rds"))
# Add the education level identifier
precomp_all$ed_level <- "All"

# Combine all three datasets
precomp_combined <- bind_rows(precomp_all, precomp_ed1, precomp_ed3)

# Overwrite the file with the new combined data
saveRDS(precomp_combined, here("Shiny", "precomp_spec_country.rds"))
```

## Citations

```{r}

packages %>%
  map(citation) %>%
  print(style = "text")

```


## Colophon

```{r}

sessionInfo()

```
